Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to the Reynolds family
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system constituting state route thirty-five, between state route one hundred twenty-one and the North Salem road traffic light in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to the Reynolds family.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to the Reynolds family
